injuries.comment: Brodin will miss Sunday's (Dec. 14) game versus the Bruins.
Sturm exited Saturday's (Dec. 13) game against Ottawa because of an upper-body injury
The Bruins rerported Aspirot (upper body) is expected to miss Sunday's game against Minnesota, per Jim McBride of The Boston Globe.
The Bruins reported Arvidsson (lower body) isn't expected to play against Minnesota on Sunday, according to Jim McBride of The Boston Globe.
